name: Easy Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (broken into pieces)
2 cups Frozen Non-Dairy Whipped Topping (thawed and cooled)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place the chocolate and microwave at HIGH for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until melted and smooth when stirred. Set aside.
2. In a small mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, cream cheese, and milk until well blended and smooth.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate.
4. Gradually blend in the whipped topping.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Serve with additional whipped topping, if desired. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
April 1995, Hershey's Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (8 oz. package), Hershey Chocolate USA, Hershey PA 17033-0815, 1-800-468-1714.
Recipe By: C. Baden
